name: langchain
description: Elixir implementation of a LangChain style framework that lets Elixir projects integrate with and leverage LLMs.
summaryZh: Elixir implementation of a LangChain style framework that lets Elixir projects integrate with and leverage LLMs. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。
